shots.description: Caleb's computer monitor showing Bluebook competition win — CU screen replacement with custom UI design
shots.notes: Brief insert shot

shots.description: Aerial WS — helicopter flying over mountain estate, vast wilderness below. Plate photography with matte painting extension to establish estate boundary.
shots.notes: Hero establishing shot — sets the tone for isolation

shots.description: Aerial WS — helicopter approaching landing zone near river, mountains in BG. Second aerial plate with matte painting.
shots.notes: Shorter aerial plate

shots.description: MS — Helicopter landing, Caleb exits. Rotor downwash on practical location with minor cleanup.
shots.notes: Practical helicopter — cleanup for safety rigging

shots.description: WS — Caleb walks along river toward facility. Matte painting extension to show hidden entrance integrated into landscape.
shots.notes: Key reveal of facility — CG entrance composited into Norwegian landscape

shots.description: CU — Facial recognition console screen. Screen replacement with UI graphics.
shots.notes: Console UI design needed

shots.description: MS — Nathan's lab monitors showing AI data visualization during Turing test explanation. Screen replacement.
CU — Lab display showing Bluebook search architecture diagram. Screen replacement.
MS — Living area background monitor showing ambient content during Nathan/Caleb debrief. Screen replacement.
shots.notes: Background element — lower priority

shots.description: CU — Caleb's laptop showing Bluebook search results about AI. Screen replacement.
OTS — Caleb at laptop, screen visible with research content. Screen replacement with reflection on Caleb's face.
shots.notes: Screen light on actor's face may need augmentation

shots.description: MS — Corridor door lock indicator panel glowing green/red. Small screen replacement.
shots.notes: Recurring element — template comp

shots.description: CU — Keycard reader accepting Caleb's card. Small screen/LED replacement.
CU — Caleb's laptop showing hacked security system footage of Nathan with Kyoko. Screen replacement with security cam quality VFX.
shots.notes: Security footage content may require separate shoot or CG

shots.description: CU — Security footage showing Nathan's interactions with previous robot models. Screen replacement with VFX-within-VFX.
shots.notes: Security cam footage of CG robots — lower resolution but still requires CG character work

shots.description: OTS — Caleb watching laptop security footage. Screen replacement with reflected light on actor.
MS — Nathan's monitoring station showing battery backup footage to Caleb. Screen replacement.
shots.notes: Nathan's reveal scene — footage must track with dialogue

shots.description: CU — Monitor showing AI data visualization during Nathan's explanation. Screen replacement.
WS — Hero reveal: Ava stands in her room as Caleb enters observation corridor. First full view of CG robot body through glass wall. Full CG body replacement with glass reflections.
shots.notes: HERO SHOT — first reveal of Ava. Sets the VFX quality bar for the entire film.

shots.description: MS — Ava approaches glass wall. CG body replacement — walking animation, torso and legs visible. Internal mechanisms animate subtly.
MCU — Ava's face and upper body as she introduces herself. CG neck and upper chest visible. Face-to-body transition is critical.
shots.notes: Tightest face-to-CG transition in Session 1

shots.description: MS — OTS Caleb, Ava seated talking through glass. CG body replacement with glass wall reflections of both characters.
WS — Ava standing and moving around her room during conversation. Full body visible — CG replacement with room environment interaction (shadows, reflections on floor).
CU — Ava's hand gesturing during conversation. Real fingers with CG wrist/forearm visible at edge of frame.
shots.notes: Tight frame — transition zone between real hand and CG arm

shots.description: MS — CCTV monitoring view: Nathan watches Ava on security monitor. Screen replacement with degraded-quality CG Ava.
shots.notes: Lower-res CG for security cam look

shots.description: MS — Ava seated, final exchange of Session 1. CG body replacement with subtle internal mechanism movement.
WS — Session 2 opening. Ava in her room, more comfortable body language. CG body replacement with natural movement.
MS — Ava picks up drawing pad. Real hands on paper, CG arms visible. Interaction between practical prop and CG body.
shots.notes: Prop interaction challenge

shots.description: CU — Ava holds drawing up to glass wall. Real fingers gripping paper, CG forearm and wrist visible. Glass reflection shows CG body.
shots.notes: Close framing with prop interaction and reflection

shots.description: MS — Ava walking and talking, animated gestures. Full CG body in motion.
MCU — Ava's upper body during emotional exchange about the outside world. Face-to-CG transition in close framing.
WS — End of Session 2. Ava standing in room. CG body replacement with natural stance.
shots.notes: Wider framing — slightly less detail pressure

shots.description: WS — Facility lights cut to red emergency. Practical lighting change. Security monitors go to static.
shots.notes: Mostly practical — screen static only

shots.description: MS — Ava in red emergency lighting. CG body replacement with dramatic red illumination. Internal mechanisms glow differently in low light.
shots.notes: New lighting setup for CG character — red emergency pass

shots.description: MCU — Ava whispers warning to Caleb during power cut. CG neck/upper body in red light. Intimate framing.
shots.notes: Key story beat — CG quality critical

shots.description: WS — Power restored. Lights return to normal. Ava visible through glass in normal lighting again.
shots.notes: Transition from red back to normal

shots.description: WS — Second power cut during Session 4. Same red emergency lighting. CG Ava body replacement.
shots.notes: Reuse red lighting CG setup from first power cut

shots.description: MCU — Ava urgently telling Caleb about Nathan's surveillance. CG body in red light.
MS — Ava's body language changes during power cut — more human, less performative. CG body replacement.
CU — Security monitoring screens showing static during power cut. Screen replacement.
shots.notes: Simple static pattern

shots.description: WS — Ava walks to wardrobe area in her room. Full CG body visible in normal room lighting.
MS — Ava pulls stockings up over CG mechanical legs. Practical fabric interacting with CG limbs. Cloth-over-mechanism transition.
shots.notes: HERO SHOT — clothing interacting with CG body. Requires cloth sim or careful hand animation.

shots.description: MS — Ava puts on dress over CG torso. Mechanical body visible momentarily before fabric covers it.
shots.notes: Another clothing-over-mechanism hero moment

shots.description: CU — Ava puts on wig. Transition from visible CG skull/head mechanism to wig covering it. Real face framed by CG-to-wig transition.
shots.notes: Delicate CG work around hairline

shots.description: WS — Ava fully dressed, turns to face Caleb. Only face/hands real, subtle CG at neck/collar and wrists where mechanical meets clothing.
shots.notes: Reduced CG area — mainly transition zones

shots.description: MCU — Caleb's reaction to Ava dressed up. OTS with Ava's CG shoulder/collar visible at edge of frame.
shots.notes: Minimal CG visible but must be seamless

shots.description: WS — Aerial or high-angle establishing shot of estate grounds with forest and mountains. Matte painting extension.
WS — Nathan and Caleb walking through forest. Location photography with minor matte painting for sky/mountain extension.
shots.notes: Mostly practical location

shots.description: WS — Waterfall establishing shot. Practical location with minor matte painting touch-up.
shots.notes: Practical waterfall — minor enhancements only

shots.description: WS — Caleb discovers closet doors open revealing hanging robot bodies. Practical mannequins with CG enhancement for mechanical detail.
shots.notes: Practical base with CG augmentation

shots.description: CU — Close-up of previous robot model face. Practical prosthetic with CG translucent skin effect and visible internal wiring.
shots.notes: CG skin translucency consistent with Ava's design language

shots.description: MS — Second robot model in different state of completion. Practical with CG enhancement.
CU — Previous robot body showing exposed mechanisms. Practical build with CG internal glow and detail enhancement.
MS — Nathan's computer screen showing archived data on previous models. Screen replacement.
WS — Session 5 opens. Ava in her room, body language more human than ever. CG body replacement.
MCU — Ava's most intimate close-up. Face-to-body CG transition must be invisible. Hero quality CG at tightest framing in the film.
shots.notes: HERO SHOT — highest quality CG face-to-body transition in the film

shots.description: CU — Ava presses hand against glass. Real hand on glass, CG wrist and arm visible. Contact shadow and glass interaction.
shots.notes: HERO SHOT — CG body and glass interaction in close-up

shots.description: MS — Ava standing, emotionally vulnerable. CG body with subtle breathing-like mechanism animation.
shots.notes: Internal mechanisms animate to suggest emotion

shots.description: OTS Caleb — Ava through glass. CG body with glass reflections. Medium wide framing.
MCU — Ava discussing escape plan. CG upper body, emotional performance.
CU — Caleb slices forearm with razor blade. Practical blood with CG wound opening showing tissue and tendons.
shots.notes: HERO SHOT — audience must believe this is a real wound. CG augments practical prosthetic.

shots.description: ECU — Caleb's forearm wound open, blood flowing. CG blood flow enhancement on practical wound prosthetic.
shots.notes: Tight insert — CG blood dynamics

shots.description: ECU — Caleb's eye in mirror. Possible subtle CG enhancement to show organic pupil dilation. Mirror reflection comp.
shots.notes: Subtle — may be achievable practically

shots.description: WS — Ava walks out of containment room into corridor for first time. Full CG body in new lighting environment. Historic moment in story.
shots.notes: New corridor lighting environment for CG — requires fresh lighting setup

shots.description: MS — Ava walking purposefully down corridor. CG body in motion with aggressive intent — different from passive session movement.
shots.notes: Performance quality change — more purposeful animation

shots.description: MS — Ava and Nathan confront each other in corridor. CG body replacement with dynamic confrontation staging.
MS — Kyoko approaches Nathan from behind with knife. Practical stunt setup.
shots.notes: Practical stunt — minor cleanup

shots.description: CU — Kyoko stabs Nathan in the back. Practical knife with CG blood splash enhancement. CG entry wound.
shots.notes: Practical stunt with CG blood augmentation

shots.description: CU — Nathan strikes Kyoko's face. Her jaw breaks revealing robot mechanism underneath skin. CG skin-to-mechanism transition. Kyoko's robot reveal.
shots.notes: HERO SHOT — Kyoko reveal. Practical prosthetic base with CG transition from skin to mechanism.

shots.description: MS — Kyoko with broken jaw visible. CG mechanism visible through damaged skin. Multiple angles.
shots.notes: Sustained Kyoko reveal

shots.description: CU — Ava drives knife into Nathan. CG robot arm performing stabbing action with practical blood on actor. Complex CG-practical interaction.
shots.notes: HERO SHOT — CG character performing violent action with practical blood and actor interaction

shots.description: MS — Nathan collapses. Practical blood and wound with minor CG enhancement for continuity.
shots.notes: Mostly practical

shots.description: WS — Aftermath wide shot of corridor. Ava standing over Nathan. CG body replacement.
MS — Ava enters closet with previous robot models. Reaches for synthetic skin panels. CG body with practical prosthetic robots around her.
CU — Ava applies synthetic skin to her CG forearm. Mechanical arm progressively covered with skin-like material. Hero transformation moment.
shots.notes: HERO SHOT — progressive skin application on CG body

shots.description: MS — Ava in mirror. CG body partially covered with skin — mirror reflection requires double CG render. Most complex individual VFX shot in the film.
shots.notes: HERO SHOT — mirror requires complete second CG render. Highest complexity single shot in film.

shots.description: MS — Ava walks past trapped Caleb. Now appears human — minimal CG at subtle transition zones. Glass wall between them.
shots.notes: Minimal CG — she appears human now

shots.description: WS — Ava exits facility entrance into exterior. CG/matte painting for facility entrance integrated with Norwegian landscape.
shots.notes: Transition from practical set to location photography

shots.description: WS — Ava approaches helipad. Mountain backdrop with matte painting extension. Helicopter practical or stock plate.
WS — Final shot: Ava at city intersection watching people. Practical location shoot with possible crowd augmentation and beauty work.
shots.notes: Mostly practical — final image of the film. Subtle work only.
